text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
It's my birthday. The least you can do is go out to
eat with me, Nakayama.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
No can do. Crowds always make too much of a
racket. Nothing's worse than a crazy party.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Fine. What if I said it'd be just the two of us?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
We'll have a private table—I'd pay you extra
special attention.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's some big bait you're dangling. But I don't
bite unless there's a payoff.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: It's gotta be something really special, worth going all in for.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're no fool. You won't let me catch you
that easily.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You know... that's exactly why I like you.
Everyone else is just too easy.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So don't go letting yourself get snatched up with
those small fry.
